channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: PGA Tour pro Adam Hadwin makes amends with course crew after outburst leads to sprinkler mishap
item.description: Golfer Adam Hadwin has made amends for his Valspar Championship outburst last week by paying for the damages he had caused and purchasing lunch for the course crew.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prep roundup: Serra baseball gets revenge on St. Francis, Lancers blank St. Ignatius in softball, Pittsburg stays hot
item.description: A big day of high school baseball and high school softball in the Bay Area saw several top-10 teams face off, including a No. 1 vs. No. 2 showdown.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Milos Uzan's late bucket on inbound play sends Houston into Elite Eight with 62-60 win over Purdue
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Houston spent time this week practicing an inbound play that coach Kelvin Sampson thought his team might need against Purdue. Milos Uzan, the third option, ran it to perfection.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Top-seeded Auburn rallies in 2nd half, beats Michigan 78-65 in Sweet 16 of March Madness
item.description: Freshman Tahaad Pettiford and senior Denver Jones turned in dazzling performances when it mattered most, rallying top-seeded Auburn to a 78-65 victory over Michigan in the Sweet 16 of the NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Paul Newberry, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Utah HC loses to defending champs in OT, 2-1
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) - Sam Bennett scored his second goal of the game off an assist from Brad Marchand at 4:18 of overtime to give the Florida Panthers a 2-1 win over the Utah Hockey Club at Amerant Bank Arena on Friday. By earning one point, Utah is now nine points behind St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bill Belichick, girlfriend Jordon Hudson team up to mock Falcons over infamous Super Bowl loss
item.description: Bill Belichick still appears to hold a grudge against the Falcons since they decided against hiring him as their coach. So, he trolled them over their infamous Super Bowl loss.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: MiLaysia Fulwiley responds to tongue-lashing by coach and leads South Carolina into the Elite Eight
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Dawn Staley has seen a lot of growth in South Carolina star guard MiLaysia Fulwiley over the last few months. The Gamecocks coach wasn't happy with the way the sophomore was playing on either end of the court on Friday, so she lit into her in the third quarter.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: JuJu Watkins’ season-ending knee injury leaves a ‘big void’ in women’s NCAA Tournament
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Dawn Staley sent JuJu Watkins a text as soon as she saw the star Southern California sophomore suffer a season-ending knee injury on Monday night. It was “really tough” to see Watkins in pain, the South Carolina women's basketball coach said.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-Penn State star Abdul Carter makes case for No. 1 pick in NFL Draft
item.description: Former Penn State Nittany Lions star Abdul Carter stated his case for the No. 1 pick on Friday as he spoke to the media at his pro day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brazil fires coach Dorival Júnior after worst defeat in World Cup qualifying
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — Brazil coach Dorival Júnior was fired on Friday after 14 months amid poor results and disappointing performances from the national team.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UConn star Paige Bueckers will enter 2025 WNBA Draft
item.description: UConn star Paige Bueckers will enter the 2025 WNBA Draft after four seasons with the Huskies. She will enter the draft once the team's tournament run is over, Bueckers told ESPN.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Orioles' Tyler O'Neill crushes home run on MLB's Opening Day to extend record
item.description: Tyler O’Neill's Baltimore Orioles debut was similar to his past five Opening Days, as the Canadian swatted a three-run homer in Toronto to extend his MLB record.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Olympic skier Berkin Usta and father killed in fire at closed Turkish ski resort
item.description: Berkin Usta, an Olympic alpine skier who competed in the Beijing Games, and his father were tragically killed in a hotel fire on Thursday, despite the resort being closed in January.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Giddey's half-court buzzer beater completes miraculous comeback against Lakers, 119-117
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Josh Giddey could feel it as soon as the ball left his fingertips. In a flash, teammates were mobbing him.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lightning strike early and often in 8-0 win over Utah HC
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club will need close to a miracle to make the NHL playoffs now. After suffering its worst blowout loss of the season, coupled with a St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sox fans shower Derrick Rose with MVP chants during first pitch
item.description: CHICAGO - Coming back to Chicago never gets old for Derrick Rose. The former Bulls MVP returned to the South Side Thursday to throw out the first pitch at the White Sox home opener, where he was showered with MVP chants from the crowd. "It's surreal. It's always surreal.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9

item.title: New San Diego Padres mural in North Park nears completion
item.description: A new San Diego Padres-themed mural in North Park replacing a previous work of public art that had been defaced earlier this year by fans of the rival Los Angeles Dodgers is nearing completion, just in time for opening weekend.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: SF's Chase Center hosting NCAA Men's Basketball games Thursday, Saturday
item.description: (BCN) -- San Francisco is hosting two games at Chase Center on Thursday in the NCAA Men's Basketball Championship tournament. At 4:39 p.m., University of Florida, which is the No. 1 seed in the West region of the tournament's bracket, plays No. 4 University of Maryland.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Royal Riot Podcast Exclusive: Ariath Piol talks goals, red cards, and his journey to RSL
item.description: Royal Riot Podcast hosts Hayden and Mattey sit down with Ariath Piol in an exclusive interview where the player opens up about his journey to RSL, the emotions, lessons, and support he has received from the club and more.
item.dc:creator: Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Will Applegate: Why Grand Junction's three-sport star chose baseball and his legacy on GJHS
item.description: Few local high school athletes have made an impact quite like Grand Junction High School's Will Applegate.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Major League Cricket coming to Oakland Coliseum
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (KRON) -- In the East Bay, the City of Oakland has announced that Major League Cricket will play matches at the Coliseum this summer. Cricket is the world’s second most popular sport, after soccer.
item.dc:creator: Charles Clifford, KRON4

item.title: San Diego State Aztec guard declares for NBA Draft
item.description: San Diego State Aztecs men's basketball player Miles Byrd is looking to make his next move to the professional level.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Tennessee pitcher Karlyn Pickens throws fastest pitch in college softball history
item.description: Tennessee softball standout Karlyn Pickens wrote her name into the history books on Monday with a record-breaking pitch.
item.dc:creator: Gregory Raucoules, WGN 9

item.title: Sam Merrill has found a home in Cleveland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a homecoming for former Bountiful High and Utah State star Sam Merrill Sunday night. Merrill hit a couple of three-pointers in his return to his home state in Cleveland's 120-91 win over the Jazz. Merrill says loves playing in front of family and friends.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hall, Kitts rally top-seeded South Carolina to Sweet 16 in 64-53 March Madness win over Indiana
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Bree Hall had 11 points and Chloe Kitts scored all her 10 points in the second half as top seed South Carolina pulled away after trailing at halftime to beat ninth-seeded Indiana 64-53 on Sunday in the women’s NCAA Tournament and reach the Sweet 16 for the 11th straight time.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, Fox 5
